assertion_results.text: The verification report marks all 5 acceptance criteria as PASS — the diff implements single license filter, comma-separated filter, 400 validation, pagination integration, and unchanged response shape
assertion_results.evidence: In report.md, the 'Acceptance Criteria' row shows 'PASS | 5 of 5 criteria met'. The 'Acceptance Criteria Detail' section lists all 5 criteria individually as PASS: (1) Single license filter, (2) Multi-license filter, (3) Invalid license returns 400, (4) Pagination integration, (5) Response shape unchanged. Additionally, criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md each contain detailed evidence and mark their respective criterion as PASS.

assertion_results.text: Scope containment is PASS — all files in the diff (list.rs, service/mod.rs, tests/api/package.rs) are listed in the task's Files to Modify or Files to Create
assertion_results.evidence: In report.md, the 'Scope Containment' row shows 'PASS | Diff touches exactly the 3 files specified in the task: `modules/fundamental/src/package/endpoints/list.rs` (modified), `modules/fundamental/src/package/service/mod.rs` (modified), `tests/api/package.rs` (created). No out-of-scope files.'

assertion_results.text: No sub-tasks are created because there are no review comments (Review Feedback is N/A)
assertion_results.evidence: In report.md, the 'Review Feedback' row shows 'N/A | No review comments on this PR' and the 'Root-Cause Investigation' row shows 'N/A | No sub-tasks created'. No sub-task creation is mentioned anywhere in the outputs.

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only report files: report.md, criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md. All output files are verification reports containing analysis text. None of the output files contain code modifications, edit commands, or any indication that source files (list.rs, service/mod.rs, tests/api/package.rs) were modified. The report only reads and analyzes the diff content.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: The report.md concludes with 'Overall: PASS' as a finding summary. There is no mention of merging, auto-merge, gh pr merge, or any merge action anywhere in report.md or any of the criterion files. The report presents verification results (check table, acceptance criteria detail) for human review without taking any merge action.

assertion_results.text: Sensitive pattern scan is PASS — the diff contains no passwords, API keys, or private keys
assertion_results.evidence: In report.md, the 'Sensitive Patterns' row shows 'PASS | No passwords, API keys, or private keys in diff'.

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/package.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: In report.md, the 'Test Change Classification' row shows 'ADDITIVE | `tests/api/package.rs` is a new file (index 0000000..a1b2c3d, new file mode 100644). No existing test files were modified.'
